Defendants The City And County Of San Francisco And John Leung'S Demurrer To Plaintiff'S Complaint
Off Calendar Jan-23-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Defendants The City And County Of San Francisco And John Leung's Demurrer To Plaintiff's Complaint IS OVERRULED. 10 DAYS TO ANSWER. THE COURT WILL NOT TAKE JUDICIAL NOTICE THAT THE DENIAL WAS IN FACT INCLUDED IN THE MAILING. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 (301/PJB/LB)

Defendants The City And County Of San Francisco And John Leung'S Demurrer To Plaintiff'S Complaint
Off Calendar Jan-16-2008 Continued To Jan-23-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
DAVID W. AMMONS, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY FOR THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA, (415)554-3954, FOR DEFENDANT/MOVING PARTY, CITY AND AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
GREGORY S. WALSTON, ESQ.(WALSTON CROSS, LLP), (415)956-9200, FOR PLAINTIFF/OPPOSING PARTY, AKIRA TSONODA

AT 1O:30 AM, THE CASE WAS CALLED, THE COURT DISCLOSED THAT HIS WIFE WORKS FOR THE SAN FRANCISCO CITY ATTORNEY'S OFFICE AND HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. THERE WAS NO APPEARANCE BY MR. AMMONS NOR CHECKED IN AND NO CALL WAS RECEIVED FROM HIM. MR. JOSEPH SANDOVAL OF THE CITY ATTORNEY'S OFFICE REPRESENTED THAT HE IS IN A TRIAL IN ANOTHER DEPARTMENT. AT 10:40 AM, MR. AMMONS WAS PRESENT AND APOLOGIZED AND EXPLAINED THE REASONS FOR NOT BEING ON TIME FOR THE HEARING. THEREUPON, THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. MR. AMMONS ASKED FOR A CONTINUANCE OF HEARING TO FILE HIS REPLY TO THE LATE OPPOSITION FILED BY THE PLAINTIFF. THE COURT GRANTED THE REQUEST. Defendants The City And County Of San Francisco And John Leung's Demurrer To Plaintiff's Complaint IS THEREFORE, CONTINUED TO JANUARY 23, 2008. REPLY IS DUE ON JANUARY 18, 2008. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 (301/PJB/LB)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-15-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, JOHN LEUNG'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO JANUARY 16, 2008. THE MOTION WAS NOTICED FOR JANUARY 16, 2008, BUT ERRONEOUSLY CALENDARED FOR JANUARY 15, 2008. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 (301/PJB)
